outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive monthly GEX, but negative 0DTE GEX implies intraday noise. Expect pinning near Max Pain.
outlook.summary: Market is in a bullish tug-of-war. Reverse skew and positive total GEX suggest stability with an upward bias towards 566 Max Pain. However, heavy Put OI at 570 (Monthly) and Calls at 570 (0DTE) creates a massive ceiling. Support is robust at 540 (Resonance) and 555 (Confluence). Watch the 559 Gamma Flip for intraday direction.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest across all expiries (0DTE: 20k, Weekly: 5k, Monthly: 30k). Dealer hedging creates a 'hard floor' at this structural support.
Significant resistance formed by high Call OI in 0DTE (16k) and massive Put OI in Monthly (37k) acting as a dealer pinning point/reversal zone.
Strong support confirmed in 0DTE (19k OI) and Monthly (24k OI). High volume in 0DTE (69k) reinforces this level as a key pivot for dealers.
Monthly Gamma Flip exactly at current spot. Indicates a critical sentiment pivot. Bulls must hold this to maintain control.
0DTE Max Pain level. Strong magnetic attraction for the session close, aligning with Weekly Gamma Flip (564.5).

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to large positive GEX (1.20B). Dealers long gamma will pin price action, favoring range-bound movements.
outlook.summary: Market positioned in dealer long-gamma regime with 1.20B total GEX. Reverse smirk skew across 0DTE and MONTHLY confirms bullish bias. Key confluence support at 23200 (0DTE+MONTHLY). Max Pain at 23880 acts as upside magnet. High OI-based PCR (2.36) suggests excessive pessimism, often contrarian bullish.

levels.motivazione: CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT OI 563 (highest) + MONTHLY PUT OI 112. Primary structural support with dealer delta hedging floor.
0DTE CALL OI 159 with adjacent 23500 showing VOL 423. Immediate resistance cluster 0.7% above spot.
0DTE Max Pain level where option value is minimized. Market maker magnetic target 2.3% above spot.
WEEKLY Gamma Flip threshold. Dealer hedging regime transition zone near Max Pain cluster.
MONTHLY CALL OI 412 (highest) coinciding with MONTHLY Max Pain. Major structural resistance ceiling.
MONTHLY PUT OI 737 (highest across all expiries). Deep structural support for swing timeframe.
